case_title: UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. PRINCETON, LLOYD J. et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: TSUI, BENJAMIN K SUBSTITUTED FOR ISAAC, DENNIS PERRY AS ATTORNEY FOR UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $115.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCETON, LLOYD J.
